name: Radius Gauge Set
description: Dual-system (SAE + metric) 3D-printable radius gauge set with convex, concave corner (80 deg), and concave edge (40 deg) profiles on each leaf. Six rings total.

medium.description: 9/16 in to 2-1/8 in. 1/16 in steps to 1-1/4 in, 1/8 in steps to 2-1/8 in
medium.step_logic: 1/16 in steps hold to 1-1/4 in (6% threshold above 1.5 in), then 1/8 in steps

large.description: 2-1/4 in to 6 in. 1/4 in steps to 4-1/4 in, 1/2 in steps to 6 in
large.step_logic: 1/4 in steps hold to 4-1/4 in (6% threshold), then 1/2 in steps

small.description: 3 mm to 13 mm. 0.5 mm steps to 6 mm, 1 mm steps to 13 mm
small.step_logic: 0.5 mm is 8-17% relative to 3-6 mm; 1 mm is 7.7-14% relative to 7-13 mm

medium.description: 14 mm to 50 mm. 2 mm steps to 18 mm with 15 mm added, designer 5s from 20 mm
medium.step_logic: 2 mm steps below 20, 15 mm added as common design callout, 5 mm designer steps from 20+

large.step_logic: Designer-standard radii. 75 and 125 are industrial standards, 120 is common in circular geometry

convex.description: Convex arc on one end of leaf. Measures concave (inside) features on workpiece.
convex.note: Arc blends tangentially into leaf body sides

concave_corner.description: 80 deg concave arc on opposite end. Measures convex fillets in 90 deg corners. 5 deg wall clearance per side.
concave_corner.note: Under 90 deg so gauge arms clear workpiece walls at inside corners

concave_edge.description: 40 deg shallow concave notch. Measures convex radii along an edge where full concave cant straddle.
concave_edge.note: Placed as side notch on leaf body between the two end profiles

multi_body.strategy: Named bodies for multi-color MMU printing. Flat top surfaces for clean layer-based color change.

bodies_per_leaf.leaf: Main leaf body. Blue (SAE) or red (metric).
bodies_per_leaf.text_top: All debossed text inlays on top face. White. Flush with top surface.
bodies_per_leaf.text_bottom: All debossed text inlays on bottom face. White. Flush with top surface when flipped.

labeling.sae_primary: fraction (stacked where area allows, inline where tight)
labeling.double_sided: fraction on one face, decimal on other when both wont fit one side
labeling.text_sizing: driven by available area on leaf body — must fit, never overflow
labeling.content: size only — no branding, logo, or version

string_hole.note: Leaves hang with convex (larger) profile up when on string. Hole diameter varies by ring size to balance strength vs usability.

dimensional_tolerance.note: Models are dead-nuts nominal. No shrinkage compensation. Printer calibration is the printers problem. Same-printer closed-loop cancels systematic error.
